questions.question: Consider a Wumpus World with a 5x5 grid, 4 walls, and a single entrance. Represent the domain knowledge of the Wumpus World in a suitable data structure. (10 marks)

A Wumpus World has been designed with a 3x3 grid, 2 walls, and a single entrance. Design a representation to store the following domain knowledge: 'the Wumpus is present in the bottom right corner', 'the pit is present in the top left corner', 'the entrance is at the top left corner'. (15 marks)

A Wumpus World has a 4x4 grid, 3 walls, and a single entrance. Write a rule-based representation of the following domain knowledge: 'if the Wumpus is present in the top right corner, then move the agent 2 steps to the left'. Express this rule using first-order logical notation. (10 marks)
